FOOTER.MAIL: Do you want to tell us something?

COOKIES.TEXT: We use cookies to improve your experience. By using our site, you agree to our use of cookies.

HOME.TITLE: The art of flowers
HOME.SUBTITLE: Flowers are our best allies to surprise, excite and transmit emotions always with total attention to detail and finish.
HOME.TEXT_PRESENTATION:
Our Specialties


Our bouquets and floral arrangements are unique and tailored to each client. We create versatile compositions, starting with floral arrangements for weddings, including bridal bouquets, centerpiece arrangements, hair wreaths, boutonnieres, and more.
In addition to weddings, we also offer decoration services for other events, such as birthday parties, anniversaries, company celebrations, among other social events.
Our flowers and plants for the home are another of our specialties, we offer a selection of flowers and plants to decorate both indoors and outdoors.
We also offer floral arrangements for funerals, including funeral wreaths and celebration of life arrangements. If you want to surprise that special person, we offer home delivery, with the best care and attention.
Available 365 days a year.

PRESERVED_ROSES.TITLE: Preserved roses
PRESERVED_ROSES.DESCRIPTION: Preserved flowers are the perfect choice for those looking for a long-lasting and charming gift. Presented in elegant containers such as glass domes, wooden boxes and teapots, our preserved roses maintain their beauty and freshness for years without the need for special care. Surprise someone special with a keepsake that will last a lifetime.

BUNCH_FLOWERS.TITLE: Bunch of flowers
BUNCH_FLOWERS.DESCRIPTION: Perfect for gift giving, surprising and creating unforgettable sensations! Our bouquets are designed for every occasion, from seasonal bouquets full of color to classic and modern compositions. Each bouquet is made with fresh flowers of the highest quality, ensuring that your gift is always special. Make every moment memorable with a beautiful bouquet of flowers!

BRIDAL_BOUQUETS.TITLE: Bridal bouquets
BRIDAL_BOUQUETS.DESCRIPTION: Make your special day even more memorable with our wedding flowers! We offer a wide range of custom floral arrangements for every aspect of your wedding, from bridal bouquets and boutonnieres to table decorations and floral arches. Our expert florists will work with you to create unique arrangements that reflect your style and wedding theme. Delivery and setup available to ensure everything is perfect on your big day!

FLOWERS_BIRTHDAYS.TITLE: Flowers for birthdays
FLOWERS_BIRTHDAYS.DESCRIPTION: Make that special someone's birthday one to remember with our fresh and vibrant flowers! We offer a wide variety of floral arrangements designed to surprise and brighten the day. From colorful and cheerful bouquets to elegant compositions, we have the perfect option for every celebration. Home delivery available so your gift arrives just in time!

OPINION_1.OPINION: ¡Raúl es un gran florista! Siempre está dispuesto a ayudar, dando buenos consejos sobre cómo cuidar de las plantas. Siempre que tengo dudas, las resuelve rápidamente y me ayuda a que mis plantas se mantengan sanas. Además, tiene algunas especies de lo más originales, como la que se puede ver en la foto, que quedan genial en casa y son fáciles de cuidar. ¡Totalmente recomendable!

OPINION_2.OPINION: Me ha encantado la atención y el ramo de flores que me hicieron. Recomiendo mucho esta Floristería Flor de Loto. De verdad sacara una sonrisa de sus caras al tener el ramo en sus manos.

OPINION_3.OPINION: No es una simple floristería, es un negocio que está gestionado por una artista totalmente artesanal. Su trabajo es es espectacular y no tiene precio. Se adapta a todas las peticiones personalizadas; he visto con mis propios ojos realizar una diadema de flores frescas impresionante, me quede sin palabras. Si queréis algo exclusivo, auténtico y espectacular debéis ver su trabajo y tienen un trato agradable, cercano y su calidad precio es único. Os lo recomiendo.

OPINION_4.OPINION:
Pues yo he encargado ya muchos ramos para regalos y siempre muy bien, por cambiar esta vez compré una urna de cristal con un Bonsai que son preciosos, y por lo que sea a las semanas se me murió… se lo dije y sin poner ningún problema me dijo que se lo llevara y me ha echo otro nuevo, sin cargo ninguno!!
Tienen un trato genial hacia el cliente, volveré y la recomiendo para todo el mundo.

OPINION_5.OPINION:
Pues yo he encargado ya muchos ramos para regalos y siempre muy bien, por cambiar esta vez compré una urna de cristal con un Bonsai que son preciosos, y por lo que sea a las semanas se me murió… se lo dije y sin poner ningún problema me dijo que se lo llevara y me ha echo otro nuevo, sin cargo ninguno!!
Tienen un trato genial hacia el cliente, volveré y la recomiendo para todo el mundo.

OPINION_6.OPINION:
Da gusto con gente tan profesional como Rafaela.. todo perfecto!
Con mucho detalle y gusto!
Se nota cuando alguién disfruta con su trabajo!
Gracias!
Volveré sin duda

OPINION_7.OPINION:
Hoy es la primera vez que he ido y seguro que no la última! Rafaela (me quedé con su nombre) me ha preparado con mucho mimo un precioso ramo de claveles multicolor.
Ha sido además muy atenta y paciente porque no me decidía por unas flores u otras y quería ceñirme a un presupuesto :).
Gracias Rafaela! A mi amiga le ha encantado su ramo!

OPINION_8.OPINION:
He ido varias veces y he sido atendida tanto por Rafaela como por el dueño, en todos los casos un trato estupendo, muy amables, siempre con una sonrisa y unos ramos preciosos!
Totalmente recomendable!!

OPINION_9.OPINION:
Encargué un regalo para agradecer a una compañera.
El trato desde el primer momento fue exquisito, con una atención y dedicación incomparables.
Nunca he recibido tanta amabilidad de una persona en ninguna de los establecimientos a los que acudo. El regalo quedó precioso. Son unos profesionales impresionantes.
Muchas gracias por todo

OPINION_10.OPINION:
He contactado con esta floristeria desde Madrid para mandar una orquídea a un familiar hospitalizado en Segovia.
Me ha atendido Rafaela y me ha dado todas las facilidades posibles.
Muchas gracias por su eficacia.
He quedado encantada.

OPINION_11.OPINION: Me han atendido súper bien, Rafaela a hecho un trabajo súper bonito con el regalo de mi madre muchas gracias

OPINION_12.OPINION:
Muy buena atención por parte de Rafaela en todo momento.
El papel del ramo no me gustó, y sin problema me lo cambio por otro.
Recomiendo.

CONTACT.TITLE: We are here to help you!
CONTACT.DESCRIPTION: Si tienes alguna pregunta, consulta o deseas realizar un pedido personalizado, no dudes en contactarnos. Nuestro amable equipo de expertos floristas está listo para brindarte un servicio excepcional y asesoramiento personalizado. Puedes comunicarte con nosotrosIf you have any questions, queries or would like to place a custom order, please do not hesitate to contact us. Our friendly team of expert florists are ready to provide you with exceptional service and personalized advice. You can reach us by phone, email or visit us in our store. We would love to be a part of your special moments and make them unforgettable with our beautiful flowers. por teléfono, correo electrónico o visitarnos en nuestra tienda. Nos encantaría ser parte de tus momentos especiales y hacerlos inolvidables con nuestras hermosas flores.

FORM_ORDER_WHATSAPP.TITLE: Place your order here!!
FORM_ORDER_WHATSAPP.VALIDATION_NAME: The name must contain at least 3 characters.
FORM_ORDER_WHATSAPP.VALIDATION_PHONE: Please enter a valid phone number.
FORM_ORDER_WHATSAPP.LABEL_MESSAGE: Tell us, what do you want?
FORM_ORDER_WHATSAPP.VALIDATION_MESSAGE: The order must contain at least 5 characters.

COOKIES.TITLE: Cookie Policy
COOKIES.WHAT_ARE_COOKIES_DESCRIPTION: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are used to remember your activity and preferences.
COOKIES.HOW_DO_WE_USE_COOKIES_DESCRIPTION: At [Company Name], we use cookies for the following purposes:

TYPES_OF_COOKIES_WE_USE_LIST.ESSENTIAL: • · Essential cookies: They are necessary for the operation of the website.
TYPES_OF_COOKIES_WE_USE_LIST.ANALYTICS: • · Analysis cookies: They help us understand how users interact with our site.
TYPES_OF_COOKIES_WE_USE_LIST.FUNCTIONALITY: • · Functionality cookies: They improve your experience by remembering your preferences.
TYPES_OF_COOKIES_WE_USE_LIST.PUBLISHING: • · Advertising cookies: Used to display relevant ads.

COOKIES.MANAGE_DESCRIPTION: You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Here are the links for the most common browsers:
COOKIES.MORE_INFORMATION_DESCRIPTION: If you have any questions about our cookie policy, you can contact us at

LEGAL.TITLE: Legal Notice
LEGAL.DESCRIPTION: This website is operated by [Company Name]. By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions.
LEGAL.CONDITIONS_DESCRIPTION: By accessing this website, the user undertakes to use it in accordance with the law, morality, public order and these conditions of use.
LEGAL.PROPERTY_DESCRIPTION: All content on this website (texts, images, logos, design, etc.) is protected by intellectual property rights belonging to [Company Name] or its licensors.
LEGAL.EXCLUSION_DESCRIPTION: [Company Name] is not responsible for any damages or losses that may arise from the use of the website.
LEGAL.LEGISLATION_DESCRIPTION: These conditions shall be governed by Spanish law. For any dispute, the parties shall submit to the courts and tribunals of [City].

PRIVACY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.INTRO_DESCRIPTION: At [Company Name], we take the privacy of our users very seriously. This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
PRIVACY.INFORMATION_DESCRIPTION:
• · Information provided directly by the user, such as name, email and phone number.
  • · Information collected automatically, such as browsing data and IP address.
  • · Information from third parties when you interact with our services.
PRIVACY.USE_DESCRIPTION: The information collected is used for the following purposes:
PRIVACY.USE_LIST:
• · Improve user experience on our website.
  • Process requests and provide customer support.
  • · Send communications related to our services.
PRIVACY.SHARING_DESCRIPTION: We do not share your personal information with third parties except when necessary to comply with the law, protect our rights, or provide the requested services.
PRIVACY.SECURITY_DESCRIPTION: We implement security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction.
PRIVACY.RIGHTS_DESCRIPTION: You have the right to access, correct or delete your personal information. To exercise these rights, please contact us at
PRIVACY.UPDATES_DESCRIPTION: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with the corresponding update date.
